series_metadata.series_title: Credit Union Articles of Incorporation and Code of Regulations
series_metadata.series_description: These files consist of the original Articles of Incorporation and Code of Regulations as filed with the Division of Credit Unions when the credit union was chartered. These files contain all amendments.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility five (5) years dissolving or liquidation of credit union ; Electronic: electronic files five (5) years dissolving or liquidation of credit union
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
